name: BONE SCLEROSIS
definition: transformation of mesenchymal cells into cortical bone without intervening cartilaginous endosteal new bone formation
dominant_finding: accumulation of calcified cartilage matrix packing the medullary cavity
distribution: accumulation of calcified cartilage matrix packing the medullary cavity
discriminating_features: accumulation of calcified cartilage matrix packing the medullary cavity
focal densities / striations along trabecular bone

general: accumulation of calcified cartilage matrix packing the medullary cavity
focal densities / striations along trabecular bone
